fields.acceptance_criteria: Add dependency button opens ticket picker with search; select edge kind (depends_on/linked); POST creates edge; click edge in graph to remove; cycle detection error shown; graph auto-refreshes on edge change
fields.title: Feature: Edge management — add/remove dependencies from graph

fields.acceptance_criteria: Add dependency button opens ticket picker with full-text search; select edge kind (depends_on/linked); edge reason field (optional free text, maps to ticket-api --reason); POST creates edge via /api/edges; click edge in SVG or GPU graph to remove; cycle detection error surfaced in UI; graph auto-updates via SSE after edge changes; remove confirmation dialog for depends_on edges; auth middleware applied to all mutations
